unit.name: Framing CS231n within AI, machine learning, and deep learning
unit.description: Introduces the course by positioning computer vision inside AI and emphasizing that CS231n focuses on the overlap between computer vision and deep learning, while stressing the field's interdisciplinary nature.
unit.summary: Fei-Fei Li opens by describing AI as an interdisciplinary field and encourages students to apply computer vision and deep learning techniques within their own domains [ts=28s]. She then situates computer vision inside AI, machine learning as a core mathematical tool for AI, and deep learning as a recent revolution built around neural networks [ts=57s] [ts=106s]. The segment defines the scope of the class narrowly as the core intersection of computer vision and deep learning rather than all of vision or all of machine learning [ts=115s] [ts=129s], and emphasizes overlap with NLP, speech, robotics, mathematics, neuroscience, psychology, physics, biology, medicine, law, education, and business [ts=133s] [ts=143s].

key_points.text: Computer vision is presented as a cornerstone of intelligence, not just a subtopic inside AI.
Machine learning is introduced as one of the most important mathematical tools for solving AI.
Deep learning is defined as a set of algorithmic techniques built around neural networks.
CS231n will cover the core intersection of computer vision and deep learning rather than the full breadth of either field.

kp_catalog.name: Visual intelligence and object recognition
kp_catalog.description: Object recognition is treated as a core capability of both human and machine vision and as the starting point of modern computer vision progress. The lecture frames vision as central to animal and human intelligence, not merely one application area inside AI.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because visual intelligence and object recognition formalizes how object recognition is treated as a core capability of both human and machine vision and as the starting point of modern computer vision progress, which later units use as core machinery rather than background context.

kp_catalog.name: CS231n focuses on the intersection of deep learning and computer vision
kp_catalog.description: The class is explicitly scoped to the overlap between deep learning methods and core computer vision problems.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because cS231n focuses on the intersection of deep learning and computer vision formalizes how the class is explicitly scoped to the overlap between deep learning methods and core computer vision problems, which later units use as core machinery rather than background context.

kp_catalog.name: CS231n curriculum structure and learning objectives
kp_catalog.description: The course is organized around deep learning basics, visual understanding, generative/interactive intelligence, and human-centered AI, with explicit goals for problem formulation, model building, and field awareness.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because cS231n curriculum structure and learning objectives clarifies the course is organized around deep learning basics, visual understanding, generative/interactive intelligence, and human-centered AI, with explicit goals for problem formulation, model building, and field awareness, sharpening later modeling, analysis, or evaluation choices.
